items.title: Hegseth forces ouster of senior Army spokesman in latest internal clash
items.description: Col. David Butler, who had been selected by senior Army leaders for promotion to brigadier general, will instead retire, officials said.

items.title: Trump directs federal government to intervene in Potomac sewage spill
items.description: President Donald Trump said the federal government would help with an incident that poured 200 million gallons of raw sewage into the Potomac River.
